**What are you trying to do?**

**Why is today not enough?**

<!-- What forced you to file this. If you've checked ROADMAP.md and

**Sketch**

<!-- A rough shape of what you have in mind. API snippets, CLI

**Alternatives you've considered**

<!-- Other shapes of the same feature, or workarounds you're using
today. -->

**Scope check**

- [ ] This fits the outer circle (workspace library as a primitive)
- [ ] This fits the inner circle (DevDev agent-hosting product)
- [ ] I'm not sure which (that's fine, we'll figure it out)
